nasb.text: How long will you go here and there, O faithless daughter? For the Lord has created a new thing in the earth— A woman will encompass a man.”

esv.text: How long will you waver, O faithless daughter? For the Lord has created a new thing on the earth: a woman encircles a man.”

cnv.text: 轉離正道的女兒哪， 你轉來轉去要到幾時呢？ 因為耶和華在地上創造了一件新事， 就是女的要環繞男的。

ccb.text: 不忠贞的子民啊！ 你们四处流浪要到何时呢？ 耶和华在地上行了一件新事——女子将要护卫男子。”
